prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Remember, the hardest part is starting, and you're already taking that step. Break the task down into smaller parts if you need to – even the smallest progress is still progress. Believe in your abilities and focus on the satisfaction you'll feel once it's done. You're capable of more than you think, so let's tackle this together. You can do it! Now, go get 'em!
